'''Chaeloe Dantin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rebel privateer|privateer]] who raided [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipping for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and owner of ''[[Dantin's Folly]]'', and operated under a [[Letter of marque/Legends|letter of marque and reprisal]] that had been issued by [[Ral'Rai Muvunc]].
